mapper.sql: A.id articleId, A.user_id articleUserId, A.slug articleSlug, A.title articleTitle, A.description articleDescription, A.body articleBody, A.created_at articleCreatedAt, A.updated_at articleUpdatedAt, T.name tagName
mapper.select:
select
from articles A left join article_tags AT2 on A.id = AT2.article_id left join tags T on T.id = AT2.tag_id where A.id = #{id}

select
from articles A left join article_tags AT2 on A.id = AT2.article_id left join tags T on T.id = AT2.tag_id where A.slug = #{slug}

select
from articles A left join article_tags AT2 on A.id = AT2.article_id left join tags T on T.id = AT2.tag_id where A.id in
#{id}
order by A.created_at desc
